TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Alex_Bradley, title = Alex_Bradley, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alex_Bradley} }

S.FORM: Alex Bradley sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1959, ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 10, Alex Bradley, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Bradley htagan beh sa ust. hiya yaya kahul sa bngla. hiya ga sakang' pqwasan biru maki ust. pinqbaqan nya Alex Bradley mqwas biru sa Long Branch pqwsan biru seneng, New Jersey, U.S. Alex Bradley, t'aring kawas tay 1977 tehuk kawas tay 1981, mqwas biru sa Villanova pqwsan biru krahu. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Alex Bradley sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1959, ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 10, Alex Bradley, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Bradley htagan beh sa ust. hiya yaya kahul sa bngla. hiya ga sakang' pqwasan biru maki ust. pinqbaqan nya Alex Bradley mqwas biru sa Long Branch pqwsan biru seneng, New Jersey, U.S. Alex Bradley, t'aring kawas tay 1977 tehuk kawas tay 1981, mqwas biru sa Villanova pqwsan biru krahu. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: alex βra*lej s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, alex βra*lej, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja βra*lej ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa us~ɕt. ħija jaja kaħul s~ɕa βŋla. ħija ɣa s~ɕakaŋʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru maki us~ɕt. pinqβaqan nja alex βra*lej mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa loŋ βranʦ~ʨħ pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ, new *ers~ɕej, u.s~ɕ. alex βra*lej, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa *illano*a pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
